data.text: NONE OF THIS STAR'S PLANETS DISPLAY IN THE G.O.E.S 'DL' COMMAND
LISTING. ISN'T THAT ODD? UNKNOWN DISCOVERER (TWOTWOS 6012:231.189)
IT SEEMS I'VE OVERSLEPT... I LIE DOWN FOR A SHORT NAP AND WAKE UP
16 TRIADS SINISTER LATER HAVING HAD THE MOST AWFUL NIGHTMARE.
AND WITH ALL MY LITHIUM EATEN. IN THE DREAM, I WATCHED ONE COMMAND
WRONGLY TYPED IN G.O.E.S. WIPE ALL MY CONTRIBUTIONS TO THE GUIDE.
OF COURSE SUCH A THING IS IMPOSSIBLE, BUT I TAKE THIS AS AN OMEN
THAT I SHOULD STOP PROCRASTINATING AND HEAD BACK TO FENIA TO
UPDATE THE MASTERCOPY, FOR WHAT FEW OTHER STARDRIFTERS MAY BE LEFT
. IF YOU'RE READING THIS, I SUCCEEDED, AND I HOPE THAT WHAT I'VE
WRITTEN HAS BEEN VALUABLE IN SOME WAY TO YOU. ALSO THIS SYSTEM IS
WEIRD, I'D STAY AND DO FURTHER RESEARCH BUT IT'S SPOOKING ME OUT.
SOME BRAVER EXPLORER CAN TAEK OVER FROM HERE. (TWOTWOS, 6012:247.2)
OH RIGHT, THAT'S JUST BECAUSE NONE OF THEM WERE LABELLED. OKAY,
